response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI systems, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and formal leadership in enterprise cloud AI deployments — key requirements for this staff-level role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong track record in open-source leadership and technical mentoring through workshops and projects
Broad technical versatility across cloud platforms, data systems, and multi-language environments
concerns: No explicit demonstration of building production-grade GenAI systems or RAG architectures
Lack of clear evidence of vector database implementation or LLM optimization experience
Limited visibility into enterprise cloud AI deployments or customer-facing technical leadership at staff level
